name: 正常测试代码
语法错误：expected 'program' keyword
source:
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected identifier after 'program' keyword
source:
program begin
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected type declaration or begin/procedure/var
source:
program P
integer x;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected '='
source:
program P
type t integer;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected ';'
source:
program P
type t = integer
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected identifier
source:
program P
type = integer;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected type definition
source:
program P
type t = ;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected base type
source:
program P
type t = array [1..2] of u;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected '['
source:
program P
type t = array 1..2] of integer;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected '..'
source:
program P
type t = array [1 2] of integer;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected ']'
source:
program P
type t = array [1..2 of integer;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected 'of'
source:
program P
type t = array [1..2] integer;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected integer constant
source:
program P
type t = array [a..2] of integer;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected 'end'
source:
program P
type t = record integer a; ;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语法错误：expected var declaration or begin/procedure
语法错误：expected procedure declaration or begin
语法错误：expected '('
source:
program P
begin
    read x)
end.

name: 语法错误：expected ')'
source:
program P
begin
    read(x
end.

name: 语法错误：expected statement
source:
program P
begin
end.

name: 语法错误：expected 'then'
source:
program P
begin
    if 1 return else return fi
end.

name: 语法错误：expected 'else'
source:
program P
begin
    if 1 then return fi
end.

name: 语法错误：expected 'fi'
source:
program P
begin
    if 1 then return else return end
end.

name: 语法错误：expected 'do'
source:
program P
begin
    while 1 return endwh
end.

name: 语法错误：expected 'endwh'
source:
program P
begin
    while 1 do return end
end.

name: 语法错误：expected assignment or call
source:
program P
begin
    x
end.

name: 语法错误：expected ':='
source:
program P
begin
    x[1]
end.

name: 语法错误：expected factor
source:
program P
begin
    x := ;
end.

name: 语法错误：expected variable suffix
source:
program P
begin
    write(x program)
end.

name: 语义错误：同一作用域内类型重复定义
source:
program P
type t = integer; t = char;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语义错误：同一作用域内变量重复定义
source:
program P
var integer x; char x;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语义错误：同一作用域内过程重复定义
source:
program P
procedure p();
begin
    return
end
procedure p();
begin
    return
end
begin
    return
end.

name: 语义错误：过程参数重复定义
source:
program P
procedure p(integer x; char x);
begin
    return
end
begin
    return
end.

name: 语义错误：未声明变量
source:
program P
begin
    x := 1
end.

name: 语义错误：未定义类型
source:
program P
var u x;
begin
    return
end.

name: 语义错误：未定义过程
source:
program P
begin
    p()
end.

name: 语义错误：数组下标类型检查
source:
program P
var char c; array [1..2] of integer a;
begin
    a[c] := 1
end.

name: 语义错误：记录字段存在性检查
语义错误：赋值语句左右类型匹配检查
source:
program P
var integer x; char c;
begin
    x := c
end.

name: 语义错误：算术表达式操作数类型检查
source:
program P
var integer x; char c;
begin
    x := c + 1
end.

name: 语义错误：关系表达式左右类型兼容检查
source:
program P
var integer x; char c;
begin
    if x = c then return else return fi
end.

name: 语义错误：过程调用参数个数检查
source:
program P
procedure p(integer x);
begin
    return
end
begin
    p()
end.

name: 语义错误：过程调用参数类型检查
source:
program P
var char c;
procedure p(integer x);
begin
    return
end
begin
    p(c)
end.

name: 语义错误：var 参数必须传入变量的检查
source:
program P
procedure p(var integer x);
begin
    return
end
begin
    p(1)
end.

name: 优化测试：常量折叠
source:
program FoldConst
var integer x;
begin
    x := 2 + 3
end.

name: 优化测试：公共子表达式消除
优化测试：循环不变式提升
source:
program HoistTest
var integer x; integer y; integer a; integer b;
begin
    while x do
        y := a + b
    endwh
end.

name: 优化测试：完整优化组合
